title: Platform Overview
text: MedWasla is a healthcare platform that connects patients in Egypt with verified doctors and nurses. Patients can browse specialists, book clinic appointments or home nursing visits, track their live queue position, manage appointments, leave reviews, and use the AI assistant WaslaBot. Specialists manage their profiles, availability, consultation fees, and appointments after admin approval.

title: Patient Role
text: Patients can browse doctors and nurses, search specialists, book clinic appointments, request home visits, join live queues, manage appointments, leave reviews, update their profile, and use WaslaBot.

title: Doctor Role
text: Doctors manage their profile, consultation fee, clinic address, availability schedule, certificates, appointments, patient queue, and reviews through their specialist dashboard. Doctors may optionally enable home visits.

title: Nurse Role
text: Nurses manage their profile, service areas, consultation fee, certificates, home visit requests, appointments, and availability through their dashboard.

title: Admin Role
text: Administrators review specialist applications, approve or reject doctors and nurses, review pending profile updates, and manage specialist verification.

title: Patient Registration
text: Patients register by providing their first name, last name, email address, Egyptian phone number, governorate, date of birth, and a password containing at least 8 characters.

title: Doctor Registration
text: Doctors register by providing personal information together with their medical specialty, license number, clinic address, consultation fee, whether home visits are offered, a short biography, and optional certificates.

title: Nurse Registration
text: Nurses register by providing personal information together with their nursing license number, service areas, consultation fee, biography, and optional certificates.

title: Phone Number Validation
text: Phone numbers must be valid Egyptian mobile numbers beginning with 010, 011, 012, or 015.

title: Email Requirements
text: Every account must use a unique email address. Duplicate email addresses are not allowed.

title: Password Requirements
text: Passwords must contain at least 8 characters during registration and password reset.

title: OTP Verification
text: After registration an OTP verification code is sent by email. Users must enter the correct OTP before their account becomes verified.

title: OTP Expiration
text: The verification OTP expires 10 minutes after it is generated.

title: OTP Resend
text: Users can request another OTP if needed, but must wait 60 seconds before requesting another verification code.

title: Verified Accounts
text: Accounts remain unverified until the correct OTP has been submitted successfully.

title: Specialist Verification Status
text: Every newly registered doctor or nurse starts with a verification status of Pending. Specialists cannot receive bookings until an administrator approves their account.

title: Login
text: Users log in using their verified email address and password.

title: Login Restriction
text: Users with unverified email addresses cannot log in. They must verify their email address before accessing the platform.

title: Forgot Password
text: Users who forget their password can request an OTP code by email and use it to create a new password.

title: Password Reset OTP
text: Password reset uses the same OTP system and the same 60-second resend cooldown as account verification.

title: User Session
text: After a successful login, users receive a JWT session that remains valid for 7 days by default.

title: Governorates
text: Patients can register using one of the supported Egyptian governorates including Cairo, Giza, Alexandria, Aswan, Asyut, Beheira, Beni Suef, Dakahlia, Damietta, Faiyum, Gharbia, Ismailia, Kafr El Sheikh, Luxor, Matruh, Minya, Monufia, New Valley, North Sinai, Port Said, Qalyubia, Qena, Red Sea, Sharqia, Sohag, South Sinai, and Suez.

title: Doctor Specializations
text: Doctors on MedWasla can belong to one of the following medical specialties: Cardiology, Orthopedics, Dermatology, Pediatrics, Neurology, Psychiatry, Gynecology, ENT, Ophthalmology, General Practice, Urology, and Oncology.

title: Nurse Expertise Areas
text: Nurses can provide services in Home Care, Pediatric Care, Geriatric Care, Wound Care, IV Therapy, and Post-Operative Care.

title: Doctors Page
text: The Doctors page allows users to browse available doctors, search for doctors, apply filters, sort results, view doctor profiles, and book appointments.

title: Nurses Page
text: The Nurses page allows users to browse available nurses, search by expertise, view nurse profiles, and request home nursing services.

title: Search Specialists
text: Users can search specialists using their name, biography, or specialization.

title: Doctor Filters
text: Doctors can be filtered by their medical specialty using specialty tabs.

title: Nurse Filters
text: Nurses can be filtered according to their area of expertise.

title: Sort Specialists
text: Users can sort specialists by highest rating, newest, most reviewed, shortest waiting time, consultation fee from low to high, or consultation fee from high to low.

title: Pagination
text: The Doctors and Nurses pages display 9 specialists per page.

title: Specialist Card
text: Each specialist card displays a profile photo, average rating, specialty or expertise, short biography, education, experience, location, availability, and quick booking options.

title: Doctor Public Profile
text: Each doctor's public profile shows the doctor's biography, specialty, clinic address, consultation fee, education, availability schedule, average waiting time, patient reviews, certifications, and booking button.

title: Nurse Public Profile
text: Each nurse's public profile displays the biography, service areas, consultation fee, availability, average waiting time, certifications, patient reviews, and booking button.

title: Specialist Biography
text: Every specialist can provide a short biography describing their background and experience.

title: Clinic Address
text: Doctors can provide the address of their clinic, which appears on their public profile.

title: Service Areas
text: Nurses specify the geographical areas where they provide home nursing services.

title: Consultation Fee
text: Every specialist sets their consultation fee, which is displayed on their public profile.

title: Availability Schedule
text: Specialists configure their available working days and available appointment times through their dashboard.

title: Average Waiting Time
text: Specialists can display an estimated average waiting time for patients.

title: Home Visit Availability
text: Doctors may enable or disable home visit services. Nurses provide home visits through the platform.

title: Specialist Certifications
text: Specialists may upload professional certificates including a certificate title, issuing organization, and certificate URL.

title: Profile Photo
text: Patients and specialists can upload a profile photo that is displayed throughout the platform.

title: Education Information
text: Doctor profiles display education information to help patients learn about the doctor's qualifications.

title: Experience Information
text: Specialist cards include experience information to help patients compare healthcare providers.

title: Patient Reviews Display
text: Patient reviews are displayed on each specialist profile. Reviews are paginated and show three reviews per page ordered from newest to oldest.

title: Book Appointment Button
text: Logged-in patients can directly book an appointment from a specialist's public profile.

title: View Profile Button
text: Every specialist card includes a button that opens the complete public profile of that specialist.

title: Browse Doctors
text: The Doctors page allows users to browse available doctors. Users can search doctors by name, biography, or medical specialization. Search results can be filtered, sorted, and viewed in pages. Logged-in patients can open a doctor's profile or book an appointment directly.

title: Browse Nurses
text: The Nurses page allows users to browse available nurses. Users can search nurses by name, biography, or expertise area. Patients can view nurse profiles or request home healthcare services directly from the page.

title: Doctor Search Filters
text: Doctors can be filtered by their medical specialty. Available specialties include Cardiology, Orthopedics, Dermatology, Pediatrics, Neurology, Psychiatry, Gynecology, ENT, Ophthalmology, General Practice, Urology, and Oncology.

title: Nurse Search Filters
text: Nurses can be filtered by their areas of expertise, including Home Care, Pediatric Care, Geriatric Care, Wound Care, IV Therapy, and Post-Operative Care.

title: Sorting Specialists
text: Doctors and nurses can be sorted by highest rating, newest registration, most reviewed, shortest average waiting time, consultation fee from low to high, or consultation fee from high to low.

title: Pagination
text: The Doctors and Nurses pages display nine specialists per page. Users can move between pages to browse additional specialists.

title: Doctor Card Information
text: Each doctor card displays the doctor's profile photo, full name, specialty, average rating, short biography, education, years of experience, clinic location, and availability summary. Patients can view the full profile or start booking.

title: Nurse Card Information
text: Each nurse card displays the nurse's profile photo, expertise area, average rating, biography, service areas, experience, availability, and consultation fee. Patients can open the profile or request a home visit.

title: Specialist Public Profile
text: Every specialist has a public profile page containing their biography, specialization or expertise, clinic address or service areas, consultation fee, education, availability schedule, average waiting time, home visit availability, patient reviews, certifications, and booking options.

title: Patient Reviews Display
text: Specialist profile pages display patient reviews ordered from newest to oldest. Reviews are paginated, showing three reviews per page. Each review contains a star rating and an optional written comment.

title: Specialist Certifications
text: Specialist profiles may display professional certificates submitted during registration or profile updates. Certificates become visible only after administrator approval.

title: Booking Entry Point
text: Patients begin booking by choosing either 'Book Doctor Appointment' for clinic visits or 'Request Home Service' for home visits. The system then displays the appropriate list of specialists before opening the selected specialist's booking page.

title: Clinic Appointment Booking
text: Patients can book a clinic appointment by selecting a doctor, choosing an available date, selecting an available time slot, and optionally entering the reason for the visit. Clinic appointments are confirmed automatically once the booking is completed.

title: Available Time Slots
text: Appointment time slots are generated from the specialist's availability schedule. Slots are created every 30 minutes. Booked time slots and past time slots for the current day are not available for booking.

title: Booking Rules
text: Patients cannot book the same specialist more than once on the same day. The selected appointment date must match one of the specialist's available working days.

title: Reason for Visit
text: During booking, patients may optionally provide a reason for their visit. This information helps the specialist understand the patient's concern before the appointment.

title: Home Visit Booking
text: Home visits can be requested from nurses or from doctors who have enabled home visit services. Booking a home visit requires the patient to provide the visit address and choose a future appointment date.

title: Home Visit Confirmation
text: Unlike clinic appointments, home visit requests are not confirmed immediately. They are initially marked as Pending until the specialist accepts or declines the request.

title: Appointment Types
text: The platform supports two appointment types: Clinic appointments and Home Visit appointments.

title: Appointment Statuses
text: Appointments may have one of the following statuses: Pending, Confirmed, Completed, Cancelled, Overdue, or No Show.

title: Clinic Appointment Lifecycle
text: Clinic appointments are automatically confirmed after booking. After the appointment takes place, the specialist marks it as either Completed or No Show.

title: Home Visit Lifecycle
text: Home visit appointments begin with Pending status. The specialist may accept the request, changing it to Confirmed, or decline it, changing it to Cancelled.

title: Overdue Appointments
text: A home visit appointment becomes Overdue if the specialist neither accepts nor declines the request within 30 minutes after the scheduled appointment time. Overdue appointments can no longer be cancelled or rescheduled by the patient.

title: Clinic Queue
text: Whenever a clinic appointment is confirmed, the patient is automatically added to that specialist's queue for the selected day. Each patient receives the next available queue number.

title: Queue Position
text: Patients can view their current position in the clinic queue. The position is calculated using the patient's queue number and the number currently being served by the specialist.

title: Calling the Next Patient
text: Specialists manage the clinic queue from their dashboard. Selecting 'Call Next Patient' advances the queue, updates the currently served number, and marks the patient's queue status as In Progress.

title: Queue Controls
text: Specialists can pause or resume their clinic queue at any time. Patients may also leave the queue if necessary.

title: Queue Updates
text: Completed, Cancelled, No Show, and Overdue appointments are automatically reflected in the clinic queue to keep the waiting list accurate.

title: Cancelling Clinic Appointments
text: Patients can cancel a clinic appointment up to 6 hours before the scheduled appointment time. Clinic appointments cannot be cancelled after this cancellation window has passed.

title: Cancelling Home Visit Appointments
text: Patients can cancel a home visit appointment up to 24 hours before the scheduled appointment time. After this period, the appointment can no longer be cancelled.

title: Specialist Appointment Cancellation
text: Specialists can cancel home visit appointments up to 24 hours before the scheduled visit. They can also cancel all appointments for an entire working day when necessary.

title: Appointments That Cannot Be Cancelled
text: Appointments with the status Completed, Cancelled, No Show, or Overdue cannot be cancelled by patients.

title: Cancellation Effects
text: Cancelling an appointment sends a notification to the other party. If the appointment is a clinic visit, the patient is also removed automatically from the clinic queue.

title: Rescheduling Appointments
text: Only patients can reschedule appointments. The new appointment date and time must be in the future and the selected time slot must still be available.

title: Appointments That Cannot Be Rescheduled
text: Appointments with the status Completed, Cancelled, No Show, or Overdue cannot be rescheduled.

title: Clinic Appointment Rescheduling
text: When a clinic appointment is rescheduled successfully, its status remains Confirmed because clinic bookings are confirmed automatically.

title: Home Visit Rescheduling
text: When a home visit appointment is rescheduled, its status changes back to Pending so that the specialist can review and confirm the updated request.

title: Leaving Reviews
text: Patients can leave one review for each completed appointment. Reviews are only available after the appointment status becomes Completed.

title: Review Contents
text: Each review includes a star rating from 1 to 5 and an optional written comment containing up to 1000 characters.

title: Editing Reviews
text: Patients can edit or delete their own reviews at any time. Administrators also have permission to remove reviews when necessary.

title: Specialist Ratings
text: Whenever a review is added, edited, or deleted, the specialist's overall rating and total number of reviews are recalculated automatically.

title: Patient Profile
text: Patients can update their first name, last name, phone number, governorate, address, date of birth, password, and profile photo. Changing the password requires entering the current password. Email addresses cannot be changed.

title: Patient Medical History
text: Each patient has a medical history section where medical conditions, diagnosis dates, and treating specialists are stored as part of their healthcare records.

title: Specialist Profile
text: Specialists can update their biography, consultation fee, clinic address, service areas, medical specialization, areas of expertise, availability schedule, average waiting time, home visit availability, profile photo, and professional certificates.

title: Availability Schedule
text: Specialists define their working schedule by selecting available weekdays together with the starting and ending working hours. Appointment time slots are generated automatically from this schedule.

title: Profile Update Approval
text: If an already approved specialist updates their profile, the modifications are saved as pending updates and must be approved by an administrator before becoming visible to patients. Until approval, the previous approved profile remains visible.

title: Rejected Profile Updates
text: If an administrator rejects profile updates submitted by an already approved specialist, the specialist's previously approved profile remains active and the new changes are discarded.

title: Pending Specialist Updates
text: If a specialist is still waiting for their initial approval, any profile changes they make are simply included in their pending application instead of requiring a separate review.

title: Admin Dashboard
text: The Admin Dashboard allows administrators to manage specialist verification. Administrators can view all specialists, filter them by verification status (All, Pending, Approved, or Rejected), review specialist information, approve or reject applications, and refresh the specialist list.

title: Admin Approval Process
text: Administrators review every newly registered specialist before they become available for booking. During the review, the administrator checks the specialist's personal information, specialization or expertise, license number, contact details, and uploaded certificates before approving or rejecting the application.

title: Certificate Approval
text: When an administrator approves a specialist, any submitted professional certificates are also approved. If the application is rejected, the certificates are rejected as well. For profile updates submitted by an already approved specialist, rejected updates restore the previously approved certificates.

title: Specialist Dashboard
text: Doctors and nurses manage their daily work through the Specialist Dashboard. The dashboard includes Overview, Schedule, and Requests sections for managing appointments, patients, and home visit requests.

title: Dashboard Overview
text: The Overview section displays summary statistics including the total number of appointments, completed appointments, pending appointments, and the number of unique patients served.

title: Dashboard Schedule
text: The Schedule section displays appointments for a selected date. Specialists can mark appointments as Completed or No Show, cancel appointments, or cancel an entire day's schedule if necessary.

title: Dashboard Requests
text: Specialists who provide home visit services have a Requests section that lists pending home visit requests. They can accept or decline each request directly from the dashboard.

title: Home Page
text: The Home page introduces the Med-Wasla platform with a hero section, healthcare statistics, featured medical services, patient testimonials, and quick actions for booking appointments or accessing the user's dashboard depending on the logged-in role.

title: Platform Statistics
text: The Home page highlights platform achievements including more than 50,000 patients served, over 100 expert doctors, more than 25 years of combined experience, and a reported 99 percent success rate.

title: Featured Services
text: The Home page highlights several medical services including Cardiology, Emergency Care, Primary Care, and Pediatrics.

title: About Page
text: The About page describes Med-Wasla's mission, vision, core values, healthcare goals, and development team. It also provides links to the team's LinkedIn and WhatsApp profiles.

title: Services Page
text: The Services page displays different content depending on the logged-in user's role. Patients can access Doctor Reservation, Nursing Care, and the AI Medical Assistant. Specialists can access Practice Management, Schedule Configuration, and Patient Request management tools.

title: Contact Page
text: The Contact page includes a contact form where users provide their name, email address, phone number, subject, and message. The page also includes frequently asked questions and general contact information.

title: Contact Response Time
text: Messages submitted through the Contact page are normally answered within 24 to 48 hours.

title: Support Email
text: Users can contact Med-Wasla using the support email addresses medwasla@healthcareplus.com or medwaslasupport@healthcareplus.com.

title: Support Phone
text: The Contact page also provides a 24/7 support and emergency contact phone number for users who need immediate assistance.

title: Patient Appointments Page
text: Patients can manage all of their appointments from the Patient Appointments page. They can view appointment details, check appointment status, reschedule eligible appointments, cancel appointments, book again, and leave or view reviews.

title: Appointment Status Badges
text: Appointment status badges displayed to patients include Upcoming, Pending, Confirmed, Completed, Cancelled, Overdue, and No Show.

title: WaslaBot Overview
text: WaslaBot is the AI assistant integrated into the Med-Wasla platform. It is available through a floating chat button on every page. WaslaBot helps users answer medical questions and provides information about how to use the Med-Wasla platform.

title: WaslaBot Medical Knowledge
text: WaslaBot answers medical questions using an NHS-based medical knowledge base combined with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). It provides general health information, explains symptoms and medical conditions, and encourages users to seek professional medical care when appropriate.

title: WaslaBot Website Knowledge
text: WaslaBot can answer questions about Med-Wasla features including registration, booking appointments, specialist profiles, home visits, appointment management, reviews, queues, dashboards, and platform pages.

title: WaslaBot Safety
text: WaslaBot is designed to provide safe medical guidance. It does not diagnose diseases with certainty, recommends emergency medical care for serious symptoms, asks clarifying questions when necessary, and avoids inventing medical information.

title: Floating Chat Button
text: The WaslaBot chat window can be opened from the floating chat button that appears throughout the Med-Wasla website, allowing users to ask questions from any page.

title: Can Patients Book Unverified Specialists
text: No. Patients cannot book appointments with specialists whose verification status is Pending or Rejected. Only approved specialists are available for booking.

title: Can Patients Change Their Email
text: No. Patients can update most profile information, but the registered email address cannot be changed.

title: Minimum Password Length
text: Passwords must contain at least eight characters during registration or password reset.

title: OTP Expiration
text: Verification and password reset OTP codes remain valid for ten minutes after they are generated.

title: OTP Resend Rules
text: Users must wait sixty seconds before requesting another OTP verification or password reset code.

title: Session Duration
text: After successful login, the user's authentication session normally remains active for seven days.

title: Appointment Slot Duration
text: Clinic appointment slots are generated every thirty minutes based on the specialist's availability schedule.

title: Review Rules
text: Patients can submit only one review for each completed appointment. Ratings range from one to five stars and review comments can contain up to one thousand characters.

title: Home Visit Availability
text: Home visits are available from nurses and from doctors who have enabled home visit services in their profile settings.

title: Booking Eligibility
text: Only logged-in patients can book appointments through the Med-Wasla platform.

title: Clinic Queue Entry
text: Patients are automatically added to the specialist's clinic queue after a clinic appointment has been successfully confirmed.

title: Contact Support
text: Users who need assistance with the platform can contact Med-Wasla using the contact form, the available support email addresses, or the support phone number displayed on the Contact page.

title: Platform Purpose
text: Med-Wasla is designed to simplify healthcare by helping patients discover verified doctors and nurses, schedule appointments, request home healthcare services, manage appointments, and communicate with healthcare providers through one platform.

title: Verified Specialists
text: Every specialist displayed for booking has completed the administrator verification process. Verification helps ensure that patients book appointments only with approved healthcare professionals.

title: Medical Disclaimer
text: WaslaBot provides educational medical information and platform guidance. It should not replace professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment from a qualified healthcare provider.
